And creation process into different chunks because if you go to AI and you're like, here's a title, generate an article, it's not going to be very good.

So we kind of broke it down into different chunks.

specific information in your content so that it's relevant so that Google sees it as like high quality and relevant to a specific search so we make sure that is incorporated and then we also edit it for like clarity and cohesion so one thing that we found is when you know you just tell AI generate an outline for this topic like the structure can be all over the place and the the sections could be overlapping or there's just not a clear thread that's like connecting the dots and also the articles can be very hard to skim so this is another way that we like not optimize just for SEO but also for AI search just to make like to use chunking to separate the content into like mini pieces of content so that each section is almost like a mini article of its own and it can stand out on its own.
um and that's something that like our human editors are doing and like tweet but like adjusting the outline and we actually spend a lot of time on the

We're just trying to make sure that we're just covering all of our bases with the agentic workflow.

Firm, like, report or whatever that confirms that this information is, like, 100% true.

We implemented this because we noticed that LLMs, you know, sometimes struggle to follow different types of instructions at the same time so sometimes they might ignore like a specific guidance from the writing guidelines and then by adding this step at the end, we're actually creating an opportunity for the AI to go back in and find those issues.
